About This Story

In this powerful story, Grace overcomes her past failures. After giving up swimming for thirty years, she returns at sixty-four. She completes her Cuba swim and graduates college at sixty-nine. Grace becomes a bodybuilder at fifty-six. This inspiring story shows that dreams don’t expire. It teaches us that it’s never too late to start over and to never give up.

Imagine failing at your biggest dream when you are twenty-eight years old. Imagine giving up completely and not trying again for thirty years. Then imagine, at sixty-four years old, deciding to try one more time. This is Grace's story. She proved that dreams do not expire. She proved that age is just a number. She proved that it is never too late to start over.

Many people believe that after a certain age, it is too late to achieve your dreams. They think that learning, changing, and starting over are only for young people. This story challenges those beliefs.
